change_log.summary: Re-rendered all 9 HTML pages for BYO-deck positioning + new 5-tier pricing ladder. Hero, value-prop, credential strip, content slabs, role tracks, AI literacy band, use-cases (formerly funded-delivery), FAQ all rewritten per copy.json v2.0. Pricing page tier-grid replaced with 5 new tiers; grants-explainer slot repurposed as Pricing principles; psg-wsg-callout repurposed as Partner Channel callout. Combo tier renderer added to pricing.js + admin-insights.js (price_unit === 'platform_flat_plus_per_user' with price_sgd_flat + price_sgd_per_seat). New CSS: .tier-card__price-block--combo + .tier-card__price-line + .tier-card__combo-plus + .tier-card__price--small. admin.js updated for new whitespace 'us' score key (was 'elitez_lms') + new competitor IDs + new category dictionary. admin-insights.js attack-plan renderer handles structured gtm object; grants renderer shows 'empty by design' when array is empty (per recalibrated brief). All grant references (PSG / WSG / WDG(JR+) / SCTP / SFEC / SkillsFuture-approved / WSG Human Capital Partner / IHRP exclusive) stripped from rendered HTML.

Initial 9-page scaffold. Hero-split, page-hero, feature-grid, step-list, pricing-grid, data-table, faq-accordion, anti-block, credentials-grid, form-card, admin-strip, threat-card, strategy-radar, funnel, persona-card, heatmap, attack-plan.

stitch_notes: Stitch project + design system created (Source Serif 4 headline, Inter body, IBM Plex Serif label, navy #003A70 primary, orange #F26522 secondary, ROUND_EIGHT). For this institutional B2B site we did not auto-generate per-page screen mockups via Stitch — the brief calls for restraint over hero photography and the merchandising CSS architecture is the structural reference (per memory note feedback_stitch_prompts). Design tokens recorded in Stitch and authoritative in /assets/css/main.css :root.

css_files.role: tokens + layout + header/nav/footer + hero + stat-row + cta-band
feature-grid, step-list, pricing-grid, data-table, faq-accordion, anti-block, credentials-grid, form-card, page-hero, section utilities
admin-strip, threat-card, radar SVG, competitor-table filters, modal, funnel, persona cards, heatmap, attack plans

js_files.role: hamburger + smooth-scroll + FAQ accordion (loaded on every page)
h() / esc() / fmtSGD() / fmtCompact() — XSS-safe DOM builder for admin pages and pricing
Renders the 5 public-pricing tier cards from inlined JSON
Hydrates /admin-insights.html from all three intel JSONs

components.notes: Hamburger at ≤920px (test: open at 768px). Skip-link visible on focus.
Carries Elitez logo + 'Operated by Elitez Group of Companies' attribution link to https://www.elitez.asia.
Right-side visual is a data-card stack (no hero photography per brief — institutional B2B register).
Compact hero for inner pages (pricing, contact, 404, admin).
Auto-numbered variant uses :nth-child counter::after.
Used for content slabs, role tracks, parent-story timeline.
Respects price_unit_label from copy.json — no hard-coded /mo. SGD thousands separator via fmtSGD().

components.html_path: inlined; admin pages render via h()
components.notes: Min-width 640px with horizontal scroll wrap. Used for module catalogue, tier-comparison, segment-fit, country-readiness, competitor table.
Single-open not enforced — multiple FAQs can stay open. Arrow rotates on .is-open. Used on home, pricing, contact.
Orange closer band by default; --navy variant for less-loud in-page bands. Inverts btn colours so primary becomes white-on-orange.
Formspree action set to PLACEHOLDER_FORM_ID — Derrick swaps before launch.
Text-chip fallback for accreditation logos until Agent 6 sources real logo files.
Anti-audience callout. Dashed border + × bullets.
Rotating accent per cell + M-01..M-04 mono prefix.
Sticky under site-header on admin pages only.
Top-5 competitor threat cards. Hydrated from competitors.json top_five[].
SVG octagon, dual series (Elitez vs selected competitor). Dropdown picks competitor overlay.
Backdrop blur. Closes on ESC, click-outside, or × button.
TAM/SAM/SOM 3-stage funnel from market_size.derivation_flow.
5 personas from pricing-strategy.json personas[]. WTP band shown as low/expected/stretch.
5 × 6 cells. Score 5 = orange (whitespace win). Title attr surfaces top competitor benchmark per cell.
5 plans from whitespace-framework.json attack_plans[]. Rank colour-rotates left-border.

mechanics_wired: multi-page-scaffold (9 pages: index, product, pricing, for-whom, about, contact, 404, admin, admin-insights)
og-social-meta (per-page OG tags + Twitter card scaffolded — Agent 6 generates the JPGs)
favicon (placeholder set via /public/elitez-logo.png — Agent 6 generates the favicon set)
meta-tags-generator (per-page canonical, description, theme-color, OG meta)
palette-tryout (transient /colors.html kept; Agent 7 may instruct removal)
formspree-form (contact.html with PLACEHOLDER_FORM_ID — Derrick swaps before launch)
search-filter-vanilla (admin.js — text search + category select on competitor table)

blocking_gates_v3_0_1.prefers_reduced_motion: PASS — main.css final block disables all animation/transition under prefers-reduced-motion: reduce
blocking_gates_v3_0_1.cls_hygiene: PASS — every has explicit width + height; hero img above-fold uses default load (no lazy); footer logos use width/height
blocking_gates_v3_0_1.semantic_audit: PASS — every page has <main id="main">, skip-link, <header role="banner">, <nav aria-label>, <footer role="contentinfo">

known_followups_for_agent_5_or_6: FAQ on home is sourced from copy.json.faq[] but rendered inline as HTML — Agent 5 may want to migrate to a JSON-LD-emitting JS renderer (Agent 6 owns JSON-LD).

Module catalogue table on /product.html shows 17 sample rows + a placeholder row for the remaining 39 modules — replace with a real catalogue JSON snapshot when one is exported from lms.elitez.com.sg.
Credentials grid uses text chips not logo SVGs — Agent 6 should source WSG, IHRP, SkillsFuture, MOM-EA, TPGateway logos and swap.
Hero photography deliberately omitted (data-card stack used instead). If the brand later wants people imagery, Agent 6 can add a photo variant of .hero__visual.
About page has 4-step timeline (2017 / 2022 / 2024 / 2026) authored from brief — verify dates with Derrick if any are off.
